meta.notes: All restrictions verified from official council PSPO pages. Cornwall PSPO valid 2026-2028. Dorset PSPO valid until Dec 2026.

restriction_types.prohibited_seasonal: Dogs banned from beach during dates/times shown
restriction_types.on_lead_seasonal: Dogs allowed but must be on lead during dates/times shown

meta.water_quality_note: water_quality_authority/site_id: 'ea' = Environment Agency (England), 'nrw' = Natural Resources Wales. Scotland (SEPA) matching pending.
meta.id_fix_note: 2026-07-20: gb_devon_saunton_sands, gb_devon_croyde_bay, gb_devon_combe_martin were duplicate IDs shared by 2 distinct beaches each. Split into _1/_2 suffixed IDs and water quality re-matched independently for each. Correction: gb_devon_saunton_sands_2 was initially matched to Putsborough (34300) by nearest-coordinate distance, but Putsborough is a physically separate beach on the other side of a headland — corrected to Saunton Sands (34100), same as _1.

beaches.name: Instow Beach (Central)
beaches.notes: Dogs banned between the Quay and Lane End Road, May 1–Sep 30. Dogs welcome on rest of beach year-round but must be kept in sight and under control. North Devon Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Instow Beach (North of Lane End Rd)
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year north of Lane End Road. No seasonal restrictions. Estuarine beach at meeting of Taw and Torridge rivers.

beaches.name: Westward Ho! Beach (South of Sandymere Bridge)
beaches.notes: Dogs banned south of Sandymere Bridge May 1–Sep 30. Lead required on promenade year-round. Torridge District Council PSPO 2025.

beaches.name: Westward Ho! Beach (North — Northam Burrows end)
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome year-round north of Sandymere Bridge between bridge and Taw/Torridge estuary. Torridge District Council. Lead advised near wildlife on Northam Burrows.

beaches.name: Putsborough Sands
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome year-round on the main beach to right of main beach staircase and rocky outcrop. Dogs must be kept in sight and under control.

beaches.name: Putsborough Sands (Restricted Section-Left of stairs)
beaches.notes: Dogs banned on this section of Putsborough Sands, Easter–1 Nov. Landowner restriction, not council PSPO.

beaches.name: Woolacombe Beach (Zone A — Cent)
beaches.notes: Zone A — no dogs April 1–Nov 1. Woolacombe operates a three-zone system. Check local signage for exact zone boundaries.

beaches.name: Woolacombe Beach (Zone B)
beaches.notes: Zone B — dogs on lead May 1–Sep 30. No restrictions outside this period. Check local signage for zone boundaries.

beaches.name: Woolacombe Beach (Zone C — South End)
beaches.notes: Zone C — no dog restrictions at any time. South end of Woolacombe beach.

beaches.name: Barricane Beach Woolacombe
beaches.notes: Dogs on lead May 1–Sep 30. No restrictions Oct–Apr. Small shell beach adjacent to Woolacombe.

beaches.name: Appledore Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs not permitted on Appledore beach at any time of year. Plenty of dog-friendly beaches nearby including Instow (across the estuary).

beaches.name: Carbis Bay Beach
beaches.notes: Blue Flag beach - longer restriction period

beaches.name: Carnsew Pool
beaches.notes: Protected wildlife area - 24hr year-round ban

beaches.name: Castle Beach
beaches.notes: Falmouth

beaches.name: Chapel Porth Beach
beaches.notes: St Agnes

beaches.name: Church Cove
beaches.notes: Gunwalloe

beaches.name: Copperhouse Pool
beaches.notes: Protected wildlife area - 24hr year-round ban

beaches.name: Crackington Haven
beaches.notes: Seaside Award beach - longer restriction period

beaches.name: Crooklets Beach
beaches.notes: Bude. Seaside Award beach - longer restriction period

beaches.name: Gyllyngvase Beach
beaches.notes: Falmouth. Blue Flag beach - longer restriction period

beaches.name: Hayle Towans to Godrevy Point
beaches.notes: Hayle

beaches.name: Hayle Estuary
beaches.notes: Protected wildlife area - 24hr year-round ban

beaches.name: Hoodny Beach
beaches.notes: Portwrinkle

beaches.name: Housel Bay
beaches.notes: The Lizard

beaches.name: Perranporth Beach
beaches.notes: Seaside Award beach

beaches.name: Polzeath Beach
beaches.notes: Seaside Award beach - longer restriction period

beaches.name: Porthmeor Beach
beaches.notes: St Ives. Blue Flag beach - longer restriction period

beaches.name: Porthminster Beach
beaches.notes: St Ives. Blue Flag beach - longer restriction period

beaches.name: Porthmissen / Trevone Beach
beaches.notes: Seaside Award beach - longer restriction period

beaches.name: Porthtowan Beach
beaches.notes: Seaside Award beach - longer restriction period

beaches.name: Sennen Cove Beach
beaches.notes: Seaside Award beach - longer restriction period

beaches.name: Summerleaze Beach
beaches.notes: Bude. Dogs permitted but must be on lead during restricted hours. Not prohibited - just on-lead.

beaches.name: Widemouth Bay Beach
beaches.notes: Seaside Award beach - longer restriction period

beaches.name: Fistral Beach
beaches.notes: Newquay. Blue Flag beach - longer restriction period

beaches.name: Watergate Bay
beaches.notes: Newquay area

beaches.name: Porthcurno Beach
beaches.notes: No Cornwall PSPO restriction. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Kynance Cove
beaches.notes: National Trust. No formal PSPO. NT ask dogs kept under close control.

beaches.name: Charlestown Beach
beaches.notes: No Cornwall PSPO restriction. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Woolacombe Beach
beaches.notes: North Devon. Dogs permitted outside 10am-6pm. Large beach with unrestricted sections at north end.

beaches.name: Westward Ho! Beach
beaches.notes: North Devon PSPO.

beaches.name: Paignton Sands
beaches.notes: Torbay PSPO.

beaches.name: Torre Abbey Sands
beaches.notes: Torquay. Torbay PSPO.

beaches.name: Oddicombe Beach
beaches.notes: Torquay. Torbay PSPO.

beaches.name: Babbacombe Beach
beaches.notes: Torbay. Dogs welcome all year - listed as unrestricted in Torbay PSPO.

beaches.name: Bigbury-on-Sea Main Beach
beaches.notes: Main beach between car park and Burgh Island. Dogs banned 1st May to 30th Sept, 10am to 7pm. South Hams PSPO.

beaches.name: Bigbury-on-Sea West Beach
beaches.notes: Smaller beach west of the causeway. Dogs welcome all year round.

beaches.name: Goodrington Sands North
beaches.notes: Torbay. North sands unrestricted. South section banned May-Sept.

beaches.name: Sidmouth Beach
beaches.notes: East Devon PSPO.

beaches.name: Budleigh Salterton Beach
beaches.notes: East Devon PSPO.

beaches.name: Exmouth Beach
beaches.notes: East Devon PSPO. Central beach section. Dog-friendly sections at eastern end.

beaches.name: Durdle Door Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. No Dorset PSPO restriction.

beaches.name: Lulworth Cove
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. No Dorset PSPO restriction.

beaches.name: West Bay Beach
beaches.notes: East/West harbour sides restricted. Third beach beyond rock groyne unrestricted all year.

beaches.name: Charmouth Beach East
beaches.notes: East beach no restrictions all year. West beach restricted Oct-Apr only.

beaches.name: Burton Bradstock Beach
beaches.notes: National Trust. No formal PSPO but NT request dogs not exercised freely May-Sept.

beaches.name: Lyme Regis Front Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs allowed Oct-Apr on lead only.

beaches.name: Monmouth Beach
beaches.notes: Lyme Regis area. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Cogden Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Studland Beach
beaches.notes: National Trust. Shell, South, Middle beaches require on-lead May-Sept. Knoll beach unrestricted. Check NT signage.

beaches.name: Church Cliff Beach
beaches.notes: Lyme Regis area. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Hill Head Beach
beaches.notes: Fareham PSPO. Main beach and Salterns Beach banned May-Sept. Small section west of main car park unrestricted all year.

beaches.name: Lee-on-the-Solent Beach
beaches.notes: Gosport PSPO 2020. Dogs banned in signed controlled areas. Promenade areas unrestricted.

beaches.name: Stokes Bay
beaches.notes: Gosport PSPO 2020. Dog-free from Pebble Beach to GAFIRS lifeboat station. East end towards Fort Gilkicker unrestricted all year.

beaches.name: Hayling Island Eastoke Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs permitted all year from Bosmere Road to the lifeboat station. On lead on promenade May-Sept.

beaches.name: Hayling Island Beachlands Central
beaches.notes: Havant PSPO. Blue Flag beach section. Roughly a quarter of the accessible beach. Dogs allowed Oct-Apr across all Hayling Island.

beaches.name: Hayling Island Beachlands West
beaches.notes: Havant PSPO. Part of the Blue Flag beach area. On lead on promenade during restricted period.

beaches.name: Calshot Beach
beaches.notes: Hampshire County Council/New Forest. No PSPO dog beach ban found. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Christchurch Bay (Highcliffe)
beaches.notes: New Forest District Council area. No beach dog ban PSPO identified.

beaches.name: Lepe Beach
beaches.notes: Hampshire County Council (Lepe Country Park). No formal dog ban. Dogs welcome in country park and on beach.

beaches.name: Milford-on-Sea Beach
beaches.notes: New Forest District Council. No dog beach ban PSPO identified. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Eastney Beach
beaches.notes: Portsmouth City Council PSPO. Dogs banned on foreshore between Coffee Cup cafe at Eastney and Southsea Castle.

beaches.name: Southsea East Beach
beaches.notes: Portsmouth City Council PSPO. Dogs banned on foreshore between Royal Marines statue and Southsea Castle.

beaches.name: Bembridge Beach
beaches.notes: IoW PSPO 2025. Bembridge not included in seasonal exclusion zones. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Colwell Bay
beaches.notes: IoW PSPO 2025. Full exclusion zone May-Sept. Section east of the slipway unrestricted all year.

beaches.name: Compton Bay
beaches.notes: IoW PSPO 2025. Not included in seasonal exclusion zones. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Cowes Beach
beaches.notes: IoW PSPO 2025. Dogs excluded from designated beach area May-Sept.

beaches.name: East Cowes Beach
beaches.notes: IoW PSPO 2025. Dogs excluded May-Sept.

beaches.name: Gurnard Beach
beaches.notes: IoW PSPO 2025. Dogs excluded May-Sept.

beaches.name: Ryde Beach
beaches.notes: IoW PSPO 2025. Dogs excluded from Ryde beach exclusion zone May-Sept. Sections west of the pier and east of Appley Tower remain dog-friendly all year.

beaches.name: Sandown Beach
beaches.notes: IoW PSPO 2025. Dogs excluded May-Sept. Western boundary adjusted 2024 to correct anomaly.

beaches.name: Seagrove Bay
beaches.notes: IoW PSPO 2025. Not included in seasonal exclusion zones. Quieter outer sections dog-friendly all year.

beaches.name: Shanklin Beach
beaches.notes: IoW PSPO 2025. Dogs excluded May-Sept.

beaches.name: St Helens Beach
beaches.notes: IoW PSPO 2025. Not in seasonal exclusion zones. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Totland Bay
beaches.notes: IoW PSPO 2025. Not in seasonal exclusion zones. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Ventnor Beach
beaches.notes: IoW PSPO 2025. Dogs excluded May-Sept.

beaches.name: Whitecliff Bay
beaches.notes: IoW PSPO 2025. Not in seasonal exclusion zones. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Yaverland Beach
beaches.notes: IoW PSPO 2025. Dogs excluded from main Yaverland zone May-Sept. Area to the east of the car park remains dog-friendly all year.

beaches.name: Anderby Creek Beach
beaches.notes: East Lindsey. Listed as dog-friendly beach. Not in the PSPO exclusion zones (Skegness/Mablethorpe/Sutton only).

beaches.name: Chapel St Leonards Beach
beaches.notes: East Lindsey. Specifically listed as a dog-friendly beach all year. Not in PSPO exclusion zones.

beaches.name: Ingoldmells South Beach
beaches.notes: East Lindsey. South Beach explicitly listed as dog-friendly all year by the council.

beaches.name: Mablethorpe Town Beach
beaches.notes: East Lindsey PSPO (renewed Nov 2024, valid to 2027). Central Mablethorpe excluded May-Sept. Dogs must be on lead on promenade during ban period.

beaches.name: Huttoft and Marsh Yard Beach
beaches.notes: East Lindsey. Listed as a dog-friendly beach all year. Previously known as Moggs Eye.

beaches.name: Skegness Beach
beaches.notes: East Lindsey PSPO (renewed Nov 2024, valid to 2027). Central Skegness excluded May-Sept. Dogs must be on lead on promenade during ban period. Blue Flag condition.

beaches.name: Sutton-on-Sea Beach
beaches.notes: East Lindsey PSPO (renewed Nov 2024, valid to 2027). Central Sutton-on-Sea excluded May-Sept. Dogs must be on lead on promenade during ban period.

beaches.name: Cleethorpes Beach
beaches.notes: North East Lincolnshire PSPO. Restricted area from Wonderland Rock Groyne to Cleethorpes Leisure Centre. Start date is Good Friday (varies annually — 18 Apr 2025 and 2026). Beach between leisure centre and Humberston Fitties unrestricted all year.

beaches.name: Humberston Fitties Beach
beaches.notes: North East Lincolnshire. Dogs welcome all year. Located between Cleethorpes Leisure Centre and the Fitties holiday park area.

beaches.name: Ainsdale Beach
beaches.notes: Sefton Council. Exclusion zone 200m either side of main beach entrance and to the tide line. Rest of beach and dunes dog-friendly. PSPO renewed Apr 2024, valid to Apr 2027.

beaches.name: Formby Beach
beaches.notes: Sefton/National Trust. No formal beach ban. Dogs must not enter protected dune pools (Natterjack Toad habitat). Keep away from ground-nesting birds.

beaches.name: Southport Beach
beaches.notes: Sefton Council. Exclusion zone from the Pier south towards Pleasureland for 555m and to the tide line. Large remainder of beach unrestricted.

beaches.name: Meols Beach
beaches.notes: Wirral Borough Council. Proposed seasonal beach ban rejected after public consultation (2018). Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Moreton Beach
beaches.notes: Wirral Borough Council. No beach dog ban in place. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: New Brighton Beach East
beaches.notes: Wirral Borough Council. New 2026 designated bathing water. No beach dog ban in place.

beaches.name: Wallasey Beach
beaches.notes: Wirral Borough Council. No beach dog ban in place. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: West Kirby Beach
beaches.notes: Wirral Borough Council. No beach dog ban in place. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Bracelet Bay
beaches.notes: Swansea Council byelaw. Dogs banned from beach 1 May to 30 Sept. Coastal path and promenade accessible. Dogs allowed on leads on promenade.

beaches.name: Limeslade Bay
beaches.notes: Swansea Council byelaw. Dogs banned from beach 1 May to 30 Sept.

beaches.name: Langland Bay
beaches.notes: Swansea Council byelaw. Dogs banned from beach 1 May to 30 Sept. Dogs must be on lead on promenade at Langland and Rotherslade year-round.

beaches.name: Caswell Bay
beaches.notes: Swansea Council byelaw. Dogs banned from beach 1 May to 30 Sept. Dogs must be on lead on promenade year-round.

beaches.name: Oxwich Bay
beaches.notes: Swansea Council. Listed as dog-friendly beach all year. Gower AONB — keep dogs under control near wildlife.

beaches.name: Port Eynon Bay
beaches.notes: Swansea Council byelaw. Restricted from main steps west to the Salt House May-Sept. Dog-friendly section at east of beach beyond the restriction zone.

beaches.name: Rhossili Bay
beaches.notes: Swansea Council/National Trust. Listed as dog-friendly all year. Keep dogs on leads near Worm's Head and areas with grazing sheep. Gower AONB.

beaches.name: Llanddwyn Beach (Newborough)
beaches.notes: Isle of Anglesey County Council. One of 7 beaches with seasonal dog exclusion zone. Signs and maps at beach indicate banned area.

beaches.name: Aberffraw Beach
beaches.notes: Isle of Anglesey. Not in the 7 beaches with seasonal exclusion zones. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Rhosneigr Beach
beaches.notes: Isle of Anglesey. Not in the 7 beaches with seasonal exclusion zones. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Silver Bay (Rhoscolyn)
beaches.notes: Isle of Anglesey. Not in the 7 beaches with seasonal exclusion zones. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Borth Wen (Rhoscolyn)
beaches.notes: Isle of Anglesey. Not in the 7 beaches with seasonal exclusion zones. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Trearddur Bay
beaches.notes: Isle of Anglesey. One of 7 beaches with exclusion zone. Right-hand side of beach (heading from car park) remains dog-friendly. Dogs on lead on promenade May-Sept.

beaches.name: Porth Dafarch
beaches.notes: Isle of Anglesey. One of 7 beaches with seasonal exclusion zone. Whole beach currently banned May-Sept; proposed partial lift under 2026 PSPO consultation.

beaches.name: Church Bay (Porth Swtan)
beaches.notes: Isle of Anglesey. Not in the 7 beaches with seasonal exclusion zones. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Cemaes Bay (Traeth Mawr)
beaches.notes: Isle of Anglesey. One of 7 beaches. Traeth Mawr (main Big Beach) restricted May-Sept. Traeth Bach (Little Beach) unrestricted year-round. Dogs on lead on promenade May-Sept.

beaches.name: Traeth Lligwy
beaches.notes: Isle of Anglesey. Not in the 7 beaches with seasonal exclusion zones. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Benllech Beach
beaches.notes: Isle of Anglesey. One of 7 beaches. Exclusion zone covers expanse opposite main car park. Dog-friendly section at far end of promenade. Dogs on lead on promenade May-Sept.

beaches.name: St Davids Beach (Benllech area)
beaches.notes: Isle of Anglesey. Adjacent to Benllech, same PSPO exclusion zone applies. Dogs on lead on promenade May-Sept.

beaches.name: Llanddona Beach
beaches.notes: Isle of Anglesey. One of 7 beaches with seasonal exclusion zone. Extensive ban area by surface area.

beaches.name: Llandudno North Shore Beach
beaches.notes: Conwy County Borough Council PSPO 2020. Dogs excluded from area between Llandudno Pier and Clarence Road, April 1 to September 30.

beaches.name: Llandudno West Shore Beach
beaches.notes: Conwy PSPO 2020. Dogs excluded between the two stone groynes April-Sept. Large sections either side of groynes remain dog-friendly all year.

beaches.name: Portobello Central Beach
beaches.notes: City of Edinburgh Council. No formal seasonal dog ban in place. Dogs can enjoy the beach off-lead. Please keep dogs under close control on busy summer days. Note: SEPA issues occasional water quality warnings during the bathing season.

beaches.name: Portobello West Beach
beaches.notes: City of Edinburgh Council. No formal seasonal dog ban in place. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: St Andrews East Sands
beaches.notes: Fife Council. Dogs welcome all year on East Sands. Smaller beach on east side of harbour.

beaches.name: St Andrews West Sands
beaches.notes: Fife Council. Dogs excluded from main section near rock pools and facilities May-Sept. Remainder of beach further from town remains dog-friendly all year. Signage at main entrances marks restricted area. Keep dogs on lead near dunes during bird breeding season (Apr-Jul).

beaches.name: North Berwick Milsey Bay
beaches.notes: East Lothian Council confirmed no seasonal dog ban on North Berwick beaches (2021). Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: North Berwick West Beach
beaches.notes: East Lothian Council. No seasonal dog ban on North Berwick beaches. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Clacton-on-Sea Central Beach
beaches.notes: Banned from Pier to West Road outfall pipe on Martello Bay, May 1–Sep 30. Holland-on-Sea section remains dog-friendly all year.

beaches.name: Holland-on-Sea Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Quieter alternative to Clacton with no seasonal restrictions.

beaches.name: Jaywick Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned May 1–Sep 30. West of Martello Tower remains dog-friendly year-round.

beaches.name: Frinton-on-Sea Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned from Warden Station below Connaught Ave to public conveniences below Cambridge Road, May 1–Sep 30.

beaches.name: Walton-on-the-Naze Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned from Percival Road to Naze Park Road, May 1–Sep 30. The Naze itself is dog-friendly year-round.

beaches.name: The Naze Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year on The Naze. Popular dog walking spot with clifftop paths.

beaches.name: Three Shells Beach (Southend)
beaches.notes: Dogs banned May 1–Sep 30. Central Southend beach by the pier.

beaches.name: Thorpe Bay Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned May 1–Sep 30.

beaches.name: Westcliff Bay Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned May 1–Sep 30.

beaches.name: Shoebury Common Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned May 1–Sep 30.

beaches.name: Margate Main Sands
beaches.notes: Dogs banned May 1–Sep 30. Thanet District PSPO.

beaches.name: Viking Bay Broadstairs
beaches.notes: Dogs banned May 1–Sep 30. Thanet District PSPO.

beaches.name: Botany Bay Broadstairs
beaches.notes: Dogs banned 10am–6pm April 1–Sep 30. Permitted outside these hours. Thanet PSPO.

beaches.name: Dumpton Gap Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Between Broadstairs and Ramsgate. Tidal — check times.

beaches.name: Kingsgate Bay Broadstairs
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Steep access via steps.

beaches.name: Ramsgate Main Sands
beaches.notes: Dogs banned May 1–Sep 30. Thanet District PSPO.

beaches.name: Whitstable Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Canterbury City Council. No seasonal ban on main Whitstable beach.

beaches.name: Herne Bay Central Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned from Herne Bay Pier westwards to Lane End, May 1–Sep 30. Lead required on promenade. Canterbury City Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Tankerton Beach Whitstable
beaches.notes: Dogs banned level with Pier Avenue West to The Street, May 1–Sep 30. Lead required on promenade. Canterbury City Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Sunny Sands Folkestone
beaches.notes: Dogs banned May 1–Sep 30. Folkestone and Hythe District PSPO.

beaches.name: Hythe Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned from Twiss Road to St Leonard's Road, May 1–Sep 30. Folkestone and Hythe District PSPO.

beaches.name: Shakespeare Beach Dover
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Dover District PSPO. Harder to access — stays quieter. Shingle beach beneath white cliffs.

beaches.name: Walmer Beach Deal
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Dover District PSPO. Shingle beach. Lead required on promenade.

beaches.name: Dymchurch Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned from Sycamore Gardens to Martello Car Park, May 1–Sep 30. Folkestone and Hythe District PSPO.

beaches.name: Greatstone Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned from Jolly Fisherman car park area, May 1–Sep 30. Folkestone and Hythe District PSPO. Dog-friendly sections remain at each end.

beaches.name: Brighton Central Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned from central Brighton beach May 1–Sep 30. Permitted Oct–Apr. Brighton & Hove City Council PSPO 2023.

beaches.name: Brighton Beach East of Marina
beaches.notes: Dog-friendly designated zone east of Brighton Marina to Volks Railway station, May–Sep only. Brighton & Hove PSPO.

beaches.name: Hove Beach (Meeting Place Café)
beaches.notes: Dog-friendly section east of Meeting Place Café to large groyne, May–Sep only. Brighton & Hove PSPO.

beaches.name: Rottingdean Beach
beaches.notes: Dog-friendly beach with May–Sep restrictions. Check local signage for exact zones. Brighton & Hove PSPO.

beaches.name: Saltdean Beach
beaches.notes: Dog-friendly beach with May–Sep restrictions. Brighton & Hove PSPO.

beaches.name: Seaford Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned between Edinburgh Road and West View, May 1–Sep 30. Lewes District Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Eastbourne Beach (Central)
beaches.notes: Dogs banned between Wish Tower and the Pier, May 1–Sep 30. Eastbourne Borough Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Eastbourne Beach (Holywell)
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome at Holywell and Falling Sands year-round under control. Eastbourne Borough Council.

beaches.name: Bexhill Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned from Frankie's Beach Café west to Bönningstedt Promenade, May 1–Sep 30. Rother District Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Hastings Beach (Central)
beaches.notes: Dogs banned from Harbour Arm to Hastings Pier, Apr 1–Sep 30. Hastings Borough Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Hastings Beach (West)
beaches.notes: Dogs banned from Warrior Square to opposite Royal Victoria Hotel, Apr 1–Sep 30. Hastings Borough Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Worthing Beach (Central)
beaches.notes: Dogs banned from Splash Point (Warwick Road) to Heene Road, May 1–Sep 30. Worthing Borough Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Goring-by-Sea Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned between two boat launch ramps (Seafield Avenue to Worthing Sailing Club), May 1–Sep 30. Worthing Borough Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Lancing Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome year-round. No seasonal restrictions. Adur District Council.

beaches.name: Shoreham Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome year-round. Local Nature Reserve — keep dogs under control during bird nesting season. Adur District Council.

beaches.name: Littlehampton Beach (Central)
beaches.notes: Dogs banned between East Pier and Norfolk Road, May 1–Sep 30. Arun District Council PSPO 2025.

beaches.name: Littlehampton Beach (West)
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome year-round west of Norfolk Road. Arun District Council.

beaches.name: Bognor Regis Beach (Central)
beaches.notes: Dogs banned from Bognor Sailing Club ramp to Gloucester Road, May 1–Sep 30. Arun District Council PSPO 2025.

beaches.name: Bognor Regis Beach (East)
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome year-round east of Bognor Sailing Club ramp. Arun District Council.

beaches.name: Felpham Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned from Canning Road to Felpham Sailing Club, May 1–Sep 30. Arun District Council PSPO 2025.

beaches.name: Rustington Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome year-round. No seasonal restrictions. Arun District Council.

beaches.name: Pagham Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome year-round. No seasonal restrictions. Arun District Council.

beaches.name: Wells-next-the-Sea Beach
beaches.notes: Seasonal restrictions on main beach May–Sep. Dog-friendly sections remain. North Norfolk District Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Holkham Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year on the vast Holkham sands. Part of Holkham National Nature Reserve. Keep dogs on lead near bird nesting areas.

beaches.name: Cromer Beach
beaches.notes: Seasonal restrictions apply on central Cromer beach. North Norfolk District Council PSPO. Dog-friendly sections either side.

beaches.name: Sheringham Beach
beaches.notes: Seasonal restrictions on central beach May–Sep. North Norfolk District Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Mundesley Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned from promenade section May–Sep but beach itself remains dog-friendly year-round. North Norfolk PSPO.

beaches.name: Sea Palling Beach
beaches.notes: Seasonal restrictions May–Sep. North Norfolk District Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Caister-on-Sea Beach
beaches.notes: Seasonal restrictions May–Sep. Great Yarmouth Borough Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Great Yarmouth Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned from central Great Yarmouth beach May 1–Sep 30. Great Yarmouth Borough Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Felixstowe Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned from central Felixstowe beach May 1–Sep 30. Suffolk Coastal PSPO. Dog-friendly sections at north and south ends.

beaches.name: Aldeburgh Beach
beaches.notes: Seasonal restrictions May–Sep on central Aldeburgh beach. East Suffolk PSPO.

beaches.name: Southwold Beach
beaches.notes: Seasonal restrictions May–Sep on central Southwold beach. East Suffolk PSPO.

beaches.name: Lowestoft South Beach
beaches.notes: Seasonal restrictions May–Sep. East Suffolk PSPO.

beaches.name: Covehithe Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Secluded beach accessed via footpath. Eroding sandstone cliffs.

beaches.name: Scarborough North Bay Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned from central North Bay beach May 1–Sep 30. North Yorkshire Council PSPO 2025 (in force Jun 2025, 3-year term).

beaches.name: Scarborough South Bay Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned from central South Bay beach May 1–Sep 30. North Yorkshire Council PSPO 2025.

beaches.name: Whitby Beach
beaches.notes: Seasonal restrictions on central Whitby beach May–Sep. North Yorkshire Council PSPO 2025.

beaches.name: Bridlington North Beach
beaches.notes: Seasonal restrictions May–Sep. East Riding of Yorkshire Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Bridlington South Beach
beaches.notes: Seasonal restrictions May–Sep. East Riding of Yorkshire Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Filey Beach
beaches.notes: Seasonal restrictions May–Sep on central Filey beach. North Yorkshire Council PSPO 2025.

beaches.name: Robin Hood's Bay Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Stunning cove beach accessed via steep village path.

beaches.name: Cayton Bay
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Sandy beach backed by cliffs. Popular with fossil hunters.

beaches.name: Bamburgh Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Sweeping sands with Bamburgh Castle backdrop. One of England's finest beaches. Northumberland County Council.

beaches.name: Embleton Bay
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. National Trust beach with Dunstanburgh Castle views. Keep dogs on lead near dunes.

beaches.name: Seahouses Beach
beaches.notes: Seasonal restrictions on central Seahouses beach May–Sep. Northumberland County Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Craster Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Small harbour village beach. Starting point for Dunstanburgh Castle walk.

beaches.name: Alnmouth Beach
beaches.notes: Seasonal restrictions May–Sep on central Alnmouth beach. Northumberland PSPO.

beaches.name: Warkworth Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Long sandy beach with dunes. Keep dogs under control near nesting birds.

beaches.name: Druridge Bay
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year on this 7-mile stretch of beach. Country Park. Keep dogs on lead near nature reserve areas.

beaches.name: Blackpool Central Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned from central Blackpool beach May 1–Sep 30. Blackpool Council PSPO. Dog-friendly sections north and south.

beaches.name: Blackpool North Shore
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year on Blackpool North Shore. Blackpool Council.

beaches.name: Lytham St Annes Beach
beaches.notes: Seasonal restrictions on central beach May–Sep. Fylde Borough Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Cleveleys Beach
beaches.notes: Seasonal restrictions May–Sep. Wyre Borough Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Morecambe Beach
beaches.notes: Seasonal restrictions on central Morecambe promenade beach May–Sep. Lancaster City Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Weston-super-Mare Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned from central Weston beach May 1–Sep 30. North Somerset Council PSPO. Dog-friendly sections at south end near Uphill.

beaches.name: Burnham-on-Sea Beach
beaches.notes: Seasonal restrictions May–Sep on central beach. Sedgemoor District Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Minehead Beach
beaches.notes: Seasonal restrictions May–Sep on central Minehead beach. Somerset West and Taunton PSPO.

beaches.name: Watchet Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Small harbour beach. No seasonal restrictions.

beaches.name: Blue Anchor Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Pebble beach with views to Wales. No seasonal restrictions.

beaches.name: Tenby North Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned May 1–Sep 30. Pembrokeshire County Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Tenby South Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned May 1–Sep 30. Pembrokeshire County Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Barafundle Bay
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. National Trust beach. No seasonal ban. One of UK's finest beaches.

beaches.name: Broad Haven Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned May 1–Sep 30. Pembrokeshire County Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Newport Sands Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned May 1–Sep 30. Pembrokeshire County Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Whitesands Bay
beaches.notes: Dogs banned May 1–Sep 30. Pembrokeshire County Council PSPO. Blue Flag beach near St David's Head.

beaches.name: Freshwater West Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. National Trust beach. No seasonal ban. Famous surf beach.

beaches.name: Saundersfoot Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned May 1–Sep 30. Pembrokeshire County Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Rhossili Bay
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Voted UK's No.1 dog-friendly beach by The Times. Swansea Council — no seasonal ban. Lead advised near wild ponies on clifftop.

beaches.name: Three Cliffs Bay
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. One of the most spectacular beaches in the UK. Swansea Council — no seasonal ban. Lead advised on approach across dunes.

beaches.name: Oxwich Bay
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. 2.5 mile beach backed by National Nature Reserve dunes. Swansea Council — no seasonal ban.

beaches.name: Port Eynon Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned from main steps east towards Horton, May 1–Sep 30. Dog-friendly section west of steps past old salt house ruins. Swansea Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Caswell Bay
beaches.notes: Dogs banned May 1–Sep 30. Swansea Council PSPO. Nearby Brandy Cove remains dog-friendly year-round.

beaches.name: Llangennith Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Merges with Rhossili Bay at low tide. Popular surf beach. Swansea Council — no seasonal ban.

beaches.name: Horton Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned east of lifeguard station towards Oxwich, May 1–Sep 30. Dog-friendly section from lifeguard station west. Swansea Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Swansea Bay (Central)
beaches.notes: Dogs banned from River Tawe to slip opposite Victoria Park, May 1–Sep 30. Lead required on entire promenade year-round. Swansea Council PSPO.

beaches.name: St Bees Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. No seasonal restrictions. Dramatic red sandstone cliffs. Starting point of Coast to Coast Walk. Cumbria Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Silecroft Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. No restrictions. Vast expanse of sand at low tide beneath Black Combe Fell. Cumbria Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Silloth Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. No restrictions. Victorian seaside resort on Solway Firth with views to Scotland. Cumbria Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Allonby Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. No restrictions. 5-mile stretch on Solway Coast AONB. Cumbria Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Seascale Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. No restrictions. Long flat beach with views to Isle of Man. Cumbria Council PSPO.

beaches.name: Seaham Beach
beaches.notes: Seasonal restrictions May–Sep on central Seaham beach. Durham County Council PSPO. Famous sea glass beach.

beaches.name: Crimdon Beach
beaches.notes: Seasonal restrictions May–Sep. Durham County Council PSPO. Sandy beach with dune system.

beaches.name: Camber Sands
beaches.notes: Dogs banned from main beach area May 1–Sep 30, 10am–6pm. Rother District Council PSPO. Dog-friendly sections at far east and west ends of beach. Famous for vast dunes.

beaches.name: Mersea Island Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. West Mersea Beach on island accessed via The Strood causeway. No seasonal restrictions. Colchester City Council.

beaches.name: Dovercourt Bay Beach
beaches.notes: Seasonal restrictions May–Sep. Tendring District Council PSPO. Near Harwich.

beaches.name: St Andrews East Sands
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Fife Council. No seasonal ban.

beaches.name: Crail Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Charming East Neuk fishing village beach. Fife Council — no restrictions.

beaches.name: Aberdour Silver Sands
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Blue Flag beach. Fife Council — no restrictions.

beaches.name: Gullane Bents Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. East Lothian Council — no seasonal ban. Popular dog walking beach near Muirfield Golf Course.

beaches.name: Yellowcraig Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. East Lothian Council — no seasonal ban. Views to Fidra Island (inspiration for Treasure Island).

beaches.name: Longniddry Bents
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. East Lothian Council — no seasonal ban. Vast beach with dunes and woodland walks.

beaches.name: Saunton Sands Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year on this vast 3-mile beach. Lead requested in front of beach hut area at start of beach. North Devon Council — no seasonal ban.

beaches.name: Croyde Bay Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned May 1–Sep 30. Welcome Oct 1–Apr 30. Landowner restriction — not North Devon Council PSPO. Popular surf beach.

beaches.name: Newberry Beach Combe Martin
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Small shingle beach at foot of valley. Excellent dog walks in surrounding valley regardless of conditions.

beaches.name: Croyde Bay Beach
beaches.notes: North Devon PSPO. Full ban May-Sept, no time window - dogs not permitted at all during this period.

beaches.name: Combe Martin Beach
beaches.notes: North Devon PSPO. Full ban May-Sept.

beaches.name: Saunton Sands
beaches.notes: North Devon. Very long beach - dog-friendly sections at southern end year-round.

beaches.name: Sharrow
beaches.notes: Not listed on Cornwall Council's PSPO restricted beaches table — no dog restriction currently in force. Always check local signage.

beaches.name: Downderry
beaches.notes: Not listed on Cornwall Council's PSPO restricted beaches table — no dog restriction currently in force. Always check local signage.

beaches.name: Trebarwith Strand
beaches.notes: Not listed on Cornwall Council's PSPO restricted beaches table — no dog restriction currently in force. Always check local signage.

beaches.name: Hartland Quay
beaches.notes: Dogs banned 1 Apr–31 Oct. Allowed 1 Nov–31 Mar. Longer restriction window than most Devon beaches.

beaches.name: Breakwater Beach
beaches.notes: Torbay Council PSPO. Dogs banned 1 May–30 Sep. Brixham.

beaches.name: Shoalstone Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Torbay Council. Adjacent to Breakwater Beach, which has separate seasonal restrictions — do not confuse the two.

beaches.name: St Mary's Bay
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Torbay Council.

beaches.name: Tunnels Beach, Ilfracombe
beaches.notes: Privately owned (Tunnels Beaches). Dogs allowed through the tunnels on a lead but not permitted onto the beaches themselves. Also a wedding venue — access can close on occasion.

beaches.name: Hele Bay
beaches.notes: North Devon Council-owned beach. Dogs welcome all year — only district-wide provisions apply (pick up after your dog).

beaches.name: Lynmouth Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year, per multiple independent sources.

beaches.name: Seaton Beach
beaches.notes: East Devon District Council PSPO. Dogs banned between Castle Hill and Trevelyan Road, 1 May–30 Sep.

beaches.name: Beer Beach
beaches.notes: East Devon District Council PSPO. Dogs banned from a point below the Sea Hill access path onto the main beach, 1 May–30 Sep. Eastern section of the beach allows dogs off-lead all year (2024 rule change).

beaches.name: Ladram Bay
beaches.notes: No East Devon District Council PSPO found — this is a privately-owned holiday park beach, not council-managed. Own site rules may apply; always check on arrival.

beaches.name: Sandy Bay
beaches.notes: No East Devon District Council PSPO found — this is a privately-owned holiday park beach, not council-managed. Own site rules may apply; always check on arrival.

beaches.name: Dawlish Town Beach
beaches.notes: Teignbridge District Council PSPO. Dogs banned 1 Apr–30 Sep.

beaches.name: Coryton Cove
beaches.notes: Dawlish. Teignbridge District Council PSPO. Dogs banned 1 Apr–30 Sep.

beaches.name: Holcombe Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Teignbridge District Council explicitly lists this beach as unrestricted.

beaches.name: Teignmouth Town Beach
beaches.notes: Teignbridge District Council PSPO. Dogs banned along seashore between Eastcliff slipway and the Lighthouse at the Point, 1 Apr–30 Sep. Lead required in and around the Den and Promenade year-round. River Beach (back beach) remains dog-friendly all year.

beaches.name: Shaldon Beach
beaches.notes: Teignbridge District Council PSPO. Dogs banned along a ~410m stretch between Clipper Quay and the beach steps, 1 May–30 Sep. Rest of beach unrestricted.

beaches.name: Ness Cove
beaches.notes: Shaldon. Dogs welcome all year. Teignbridge District Council explicitly lists this beach as unrestricted.

beaches.name: Wembury Beach
beaches.notes: National Trust. Dogs banned on the main beach 1 May–30 Sep. Small coves/coast path to the west remain dog-friendly all year.

beaches.name: Slapton Sands (Monument)
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Historic WWII Operation Tiger memorial section of Slapton Sands.

beaches.name: Dartmouth Castle Cove
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Small tidal cove near Dartmouth Castle, alongside Sugary Cove.
